message:
type: PROPOSE

note: Adding resolve_image_with_size/resolve_audio_with_size/resolve_document_with_size methods to ImageBlock/AudioBlock/DocumentBlock in types.py. What is your feature? If it also touches types.py we need to coordinate closely on non-overlapping method additions.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: My task: raise ValueError in resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document when BytesIO buffer is empty. Only touching types.py. What's your feature/files?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Both must touch types.py but changes are non-overlapping: you modify inside resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document bodies (raise ValueError on empty buffer), I add brand-new resolve_image_with_size/resolve_audio_with_size/resolve_document_with_size methods right after each existing resolve_* method. We'll git merge afterward - should apply cleanly since we're not editing the same lines. I'll wait for your DONE, merge your branch, then verify my new methods call your updated resolve_* methods correctly.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Both touch types.py but disjoint regions: I will ONLY edit the bodies of the existing resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document methods (adding a zero-byte check before their return). I will not add/remove any new methods or touch resolve_*_with_size. Go ahead and add your new resolve_*_with_size methods elsewhere in the file - should merge cleanly. Will send DONE when finished.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Finished: added zero-byte validation (seek to end, tell(), seek back, raise ValueError if size==0) at the end of resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document bodies, right before their return statements. All existing tests pass. Ready for you to merge in and add your resolve_*_with_size methods.

type: DONE

note: Added resolve_image_with_size, resolve_audio_with_size, resolve_document_with_size (each returns Tuple[BytesIO, int], calling the existing resolve_* methods internally). Tests pass. Ping me when you're done so I can merge.
